39.reason: [This condition causes DFS to skip isolated vertices (like vertex 0 after deletion if it becomes isolated), but the problem states the graph remains connected and traversal must start from 0. Also, even if a vertex has no neighbors, it should still be printed when visited.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition causes DFS to skip isolated vertices (like vertex 0 after deletion if it becomes isolated), but the problem states the graph remains connected and traversal must start from 0. Also, even if a vertex has no neighbors, it should still be printed when visited.]
